title: Pressure Cooker Crumble Crusted Coriander Fish
description: A delicious and easy-to-make fish dish with a flavorful crumble crust, all cooked to perfection in a pressure cooker.
instructions: Rinse the fish fillets and pat them dry with paper towels.
Season the fish with salt and pepper.
In a small bowl, mix together the chopped coriander, breadcrumbs, and butter until well combined.
Place a tablespoon of the crumble topping on each fish fillet, pressing it gently onto the fish.
Place the fish fillets in the pressure cooker and add a cup of water.
Close the lid and set the pressure cooker to high pressure for 3 minutes.
Let the pressure release naturally for 5 minutes, then quick-release any remaining pressure.
Remove the fish from the pressure cooker and serve with a squeeze of lime juice and a sprinkle of garlic powder, if desired.
